tests.name: SMTP Connect
tests.reason: We do not perform active SMTP probing (sending test packets) to ensure legal safety and avoid blacklisting.
tests.recommendation: This is a passive health check tool.

tests.name: Open Relay
tests.reason: Open relay testing requires active intrusion attempts, which we strictly avoid.
tests.recommendation: Use internal tools to verify relay security.
